title: Update tool inventory docs for healthcare vertical
description: Current: documentation/tool inventory does not mention generate_brand_healthcare and still reflects older tool counts. Expected: README and related inventory text include the healthcare tool and accurate counts after wiring.
acceptance_criteria: README MCP tools list includes generate_brand_healthcare with concise description
Any stated tool count is consistent with registered tools after this feature
Documentation changes are limited to healthcare tool inventory accuracy
completion_summary: README tool inventory includes healthcare entry and updated tool count consistency.
